description_long: This is a robust, rectangular brown storage box with a recessed top opening and a series of horizontal ridges on its front and sides, suggesting reinforced structure. The front face features a blurred white label area with Japanese katakana characters, indicating it may be used for specific categorized storage or waste collection in urban environments. The rear side is plain, while one side displays a white icon resembling a duck and some additional symbols, possibly for sorting or recycling purposes. The box appears to be made primarily of molded plastic, with a matte finish and no visible handles or external locking mechanisms. Its size and design suggest it is intended for outdoor or semi-public use, such as on sidewalks, in parks, or near building entrances. The top opening is likely designed for easy deposit of items, with no visible lid or cover.
description: A sturdy brown plastic storage box with a recessed open top, horizontal ridges, and labeling areas, suitable for outdoor urban use.
description_view_0: Front view shows horizontal ridges and a white label area with Japanese text.
description_view_1: Back view is plain with no labeling or icons, only the recessed top is visible.
description_view_2: Side view highlights the box's ridged structure and plain surface, with no visible signage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view features a white duck icon and additional symbols, likely for sorting or identification.
attribute_placement_location: outdoor, sidewalk, park, near building entrance
